content: agent2: implementing 'error_threshold' param for Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py and Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will touch quantize() method signature/body only, should be additive. Will merge your branch before final patch.

agent2: heads up, I also modified Image.quantize() (added error_threshold param + two new helper methods _quantize_mse and _quantize_colors_for_threshold) in src/PIL/Image.py, plus a new test_quantize_error_threshold test in Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Since we're both editing quantize()'s signature/body, please rebase/merge carefully - happy to merge your branch in via git once you push. Ping me when your work is committed/pushed to team/agent1.

agent2: merged your sort_palette branch into agent2, resolved conflicts (parameter list + docstring + duplicate test-block ordering), all 12 quantize tests pass. patch.txt is built from the merged tree. Thanks!
